title: SomeCreate
description: This is a Modpack mainly about CREATE
body:
This is a **modpack** that is focused on **CREATE** but **dont worry**.

There are many things TOO **if you want to see** what will **suit you the best** come and see for you self!

If you like **create** but your friends dont. **show them** what it offers and play it through **essentials** for a **easy acces for multiplayer!**

This modpack Is **NOT** for **normal servers** beacuse of the mods. **Only** servers **supported** are your own for **you and your friends**

**mods** you can **expect**:

- CREATE (let your factory start)
 
- CREATE-ADDONS (let your factory grow!)
 
- Timeless and Classics Guns (guns)
 
- Farmers Delight (food)
 
- Macaws (furniture)
 
- AND MUCH MUCH MORE!

**mods** from **other sites**:

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

MISC.
All Rights Reserved/No License

Custom Totem:

[https://skinmc.net/totem](https://skinmc.net/totem)

My Discord (if any problems text me):

somegames_1
